name: Old-Fashioned Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and cook until browned and tender.
3. Add the cooked potatoes, beef, salt, pepper, gravy, ketchup, and mustard to the skillet.
4. Stir to combine all ingredients.
5. Cook over medium heat until everything is well mixed and thoroughly heated through.
